title: 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit
arrivalPortName: Port of Los Angeles (San Pedro / World Cruise Center)

activities: Visit Castillo San Felipe de Barajas fortress
Daylight full transit of the Panama Canal locks
Photograph the Gatún and Miraflores Locks

eveningEntertainment: Canal transit commentary from the bridge

activities: Spot sloths and monkeys on a rainforest hike
Tour a banana and cacao plantation

Tour a coffee plantation in the highlands
Taste wines in the Valle de Guadalupe

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Very relaxing experience
reviews.body: Refined atmosphere, excellent service, and beautiful ship design. Excursion slots filled up quickly, so book early. Slipped off to 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 21-Night Panama Canal Full Transit | Queen Mary 2 | Cunard Line
